description: Style NoteEpitomize Colin Farrell's street cred with this revv ring, and style it with heavy duty spiked leather bracelets. A versatile piece of jewellery, style it to resonate with contemporary hip hop fashion or wear it to add a twist of individuality to your denim and tee style. Stamp your look with fashion iconoclast Johnny Depp's swag with this piece (wear it on both your index fingers) - need more reasons to buy this piece?Product DetailsWide steel band with white stone embellishments spaced evenlyMaterial and CareSteelWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
